description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image, caches the node_modules directory, and runs npm install in a global before_script. Define a single test stage. Add a test:node:8 job in the test stage that runs only on the master branch, uses the default node:8 image, and executes npm install followed by npm test. Add a test:node:latest job also in the test stage, limited to master, that overrides the image to node:latest and runs the same npm install and npm test commands.
